purpose: Checked-in no-cargo contract for scripts/check_rch_remote_admissibility.sh. The preflight is allowed to run rch diagnose --dry-run only; it must fail closed on local fallback, missing offload classification, skipped worker selection, critical pressure, or missing admissible workers, and it must make the blocked/admissible report schema stable for other guards.

preflight_contract.local_fallback_policy: [RCH] local is never accepted as validation proof.

current_blocked_state.operator_action: Generate an approval packet before attempting cargo validation.

negative_controls.mutation: synthetic rch diagnose exits nonzero without a recognized failure signature
synthetic rch diagnose exits zero with no failure signatures
validate a synthetic report missing most must_materialize fields
change report_contract.output_path away from the actual emitted report
change report_contract.log_path away from the actual emitted JSONL log
claim current blocked state while omitting one required blocked-state signature
synthetic approval readiness row claims cleanup is safe without explicit user approval
synthetic approval packet has a different repo_state.head_commit than current HEAD, so current-ready paths stay empty and action asks for regeneration
synthetic current approval packet omits no_candidate_diagnostics

commands: bash -c 'set +e; bash scripts/check_rch_remote_admissibility.sh "cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --features=standalone"; rc=$?; test "$rc" -eq 2'

jq -e '(.approval_readiness_summary.ready_for_explicit_user_approval_count | type == "number") and (.approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_for_explicit_user_approval_count | type == "number") and (.approval_readiness_summary.fresh_for_current_head | type == "boolean") and (.approval_readiness_summary.status | type == "string") and (.approval_readiness_summary.operator_next_action | type == "string") and ((.approval_readiness_summary.operator_next_command | type) == "string" or (.approval_readiness_summary.operator_next_command | type) == "null") and (.approval_readiness_summary.current_ready_candidate_paths | type == "array") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.status | type == "string") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.diagnostic_summary | type == "string") and (.approval_readiness_summary.packet_candidate_diagnostics.next_action | type == "string") and .approval_readiness_summary.safe_to_run_without_user_approval == false and .approval_readiness_summary.cleanup_executed == false' target/rch-remote-admissibility/rch_remote_admissibility.report.json
validation.cargo_reason: This is a shell/Python dry-run preflight and JSON contract checker. It does not run cargo or compile Rust.
